lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਰਾਇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har bhaj naam naraaein |
lines.english: O my mind, vibrate and meditate on the Lord and the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਰਾਇਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har kripaa kare sukhadaataa guramukh bhavajal har naam taraaein |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, the Giver of Peace, grants His Grace; the Gurmukh crosses over the terrifying world-ocean through the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, vibrate and meditate on the Lord; let your awareness be absorbed in Him. ||1||
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, sing of the Lord.
Follow the Guru's Teachings, and you shall obtain the Lord, the Source of Nectar. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਧੂ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਗਿਆਨ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur saadhoo amrit giaan sar naaein |
lines.english: Bathe in the pool of ambrosial nectar, the spiritual wisdom of the Holy Guru.
All sins will be eliminated and eradicated. ||3||
You Yourself are the Creator, the Support of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਾਸ ਦਸਾਇਣੁ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak mel teraa daas dasaaein |4|1|
lines.english: Please unite servant Nanak with Yourself; he is the slave of Your slaves. ||4||1||
Following the Guru's Teachings, all pains are taken away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਫਲ ਸਾ ਘਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bol har naam safal saa gharee |
lines.english: Fruitful is that moment when the Lord's Name is spoken.
Bhairao, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਰਹਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har bhaj naam naraharee |
lines.english: O my mind, vibrate the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਿੰਧੁ ਭਉ ਤਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa melahu gur pooraa satasangat sang sindh bhau taree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord, be merciful, and unite me with the Perfect Guru. Joining with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, I shall cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Millions upon millions of your sins shall be taken away. ||2||
In the Sat Sangat, apply the dust of the feet of the holy to your face;
Meditate on the Life of the World; remember the Lord in your mind.
this is how to bathe in the sixty-eight sacred shrines, and the Ganges. ||3||
The Savior Lord has saved servant Nanak. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮੂਰਖ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: ham moorakh kau har kirapaa karee |
lines.english: I am a fool; the Lord has shown mercy to me.
Chant on the beads within your heart, and it shall go along with you. ||1||
To do good deeds is the best rosary.
Bhairao, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਤੂਟਿ ਗਈ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਮ ਜਾਲੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa melahu satasangat toott gee maaeaa jam jaalee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Have mercy on me, Lord, and unite me with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, so that I may be released from Maya's noose of death. ||1||Pause||
Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the Lord of the forest.
is molded and shaped in the true mint of the Shabad, the Word of God. ||2||
Whoever, as Gurmukh, serves and works hard,

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰ ਲਧਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਲੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vich kaaeaa nagar ladhaa har bhaalee |3|
lines.english: Searching within the body-village, I have found the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਦਿਖਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: har agam agochar gur agam dikhaalee |
lines.english: The Guru has revealed to me the Inaccessible and Unfathomable Lord.
I am just a child; the Lord is my Father, who nurtures and cherishes me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਘਟ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਸਭਨਾ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ghatt tere too sabhanaa maeh |
lines.english: All hearts are Yours, Lord; You are in all.
Bhairao, Fourth Mehl:
Please save servant Nanak, Lord; bless him with Your Glance of Grace. ||4||3||
There is nothing at all except You. ||1||
O my mind, meditate on the Lord, the Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਤੂ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬਾਪੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau tudh saalaahee too meraa har prabh baap |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I praise You, O Lord God, You are my Father. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇਰੈ ਵਸਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh terai vas doojaa avar na koe |2|
lines.english: All are under Your control; there is no other at all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh dekhaa teh har prabh soe |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see only the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਤੁਮ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kau tum har raakhiaa bhaavai |
lines.english: O Lord, when it is Your Will to save someone,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸਭ ਤੈ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: too jal thal maheeal sabh tai bharapoor |
lines.english: You are totally pervading and permeating the waters, the lands, the skies and all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਨੇੜੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis kai nerrai koe na jaavai |3|
lines.english: then nothing can threaten him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਾਜਰਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har jap haajaraa hajoor |4|4|
lines.english: Servant Nanak meditates on the Ever-present Lord. ||4||4||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Bhairao, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa sant har kee har moorat jis hiradai har naam muraar |
lines.english: The Lord's Saint is the embodiment of the Lord; within his heart is the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: masatak bhaag hovai jis likhiaa so guramat hiradai har naam samaar |1|
lines.english: One who has such destiny inscribed on his forehead, follows the Guru's Teachings, and contemplates the Name of the Lord within his heart. ||1||
